methodsAttempted.notes: Checked https://www.vlu.edu.vn/robots.txt. The relevant news paths were allowed; /api and query variants such as search-key, tags, slug, faculty, tab, and mode were disallowed and were not crawled.

methodsAttempted.query: site:vlu.edu.vn ("AI" OR "ChatGPT" OR "trí tuệ nhân tạo" OR "generative AI") (policy OR guidance OR academic integrity OR citation OR assessment OR teaching) "Van Lang"
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl found official VLU news and research pages about AI workshops, AI ethics, AI research, and AI-related student activities, but did not surface a formal public AI policy.

methodsAttempted.query: site:vlu.edu.vn "ChatGPT" "Van Lang University" academic integrity OR plagiarism OR citation OR assessment
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl returned official VLU news pages and a library catalog/research result; no student AI-use rule or citation policy page was found.

methodsAttempted.query: site:vlu.edu.vn "quy chế" "trí tuệ nhân tạo" OR "ChatGPT" "Văn Lang" sinh viên học tập đánh giá liêm chính học thuật
methodsAttempted.notes: Vietnamese official-domain search surfaced postgraduate regulation PDFs and research materials, but no public AI-specific student policy source.

methodsAttempted.query: site:vlu.edu.vn "chính sách" "ChatGPT" "Đại học Văn Lang" OR "quy định" "AI"
methodsAttempted.notes: Vietnamese official-domain search surfaced faculty AI seminars and AI-related academic/news items, not a formal university-wide AI policy.

methodsAttempted.query: Van Lang official document system AI policy ChatGPT
methodsAttempted.notes: The official VLU footer links a SharePoint document system. It was treated as an access-controlled official document portal candidate and not bypassed.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found VLU news/advisory pages about AI in teaching, learning, research, and academic integrity discussions. No public formal university-wide AI policy, approved AI-tool list, privacy/security rule for AI tools, or library AI citation guide was found in the checked official-domain searches. Claims are therefore limited to the scope and language of official VLU news sources.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Tôi biết rằng một số giảng viên trong khoa đã bắt đầu ứng dụng công cụ AI vào giảng dạy và đánh giá kết quả học tập... Không khí trao đổi diễn ra sôi nổi, xoay quanh các vấn đề “nóng” như kiểm soát chất lượng đầu ra khi ứng dụng AI, đảm bảo tính liêm chính học thuật hay nguy cơ lạm dụng công cụ công nghệ.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The Faculty of Foreign Languages page says some faculty had begun applying AI tools in teaching and assessment, and that discussion covered output quality control, academic integrity, and misuse risks.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Opening remarks and seminar discussion summary

artifacts.title: Van Lang University AI Policy Source Status
artifacts.summary: Official-domain discovery found VLU faculty-level AI teaching, research, and ethics seminar/news pages. No formal public university-wide AI policy, AI tool approval/prohibition list, AI privacy/security rules, or library AI citation guidance was found in the checked official sources. Candidate claims are limited to official-source status and faculty-scoped advisory/event evidence.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The strongest AI-related sources found are official VLU news pages about faculty seminars; they should not be treated as binding university-wide policy.
The official VLU SharePoint document system was not accessed because it appears access-controlled.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
